name: Craig Porter
bio: Craig Porter is a Senior Account Executive with Open Text Inc. covering Digital Forensics Academia and LATAM. He brings to client engagements more than 20 years of experience as a Special Agent with the Federal Bureau of Investigation, for which he handled some of the nation's most sensitive, highest-priority terrorism and cybersecurity cases. Craig spent nearly a decade as Director - Supervisory Special Agent and computer forensic examiner at the San Diego Regional Computer Forensics Laboratory. He is widely regarded as an expert on computer forensic analysis and has a keen understanding of practical application of analytics in uncovering cyber threats, vulnerabilities, and exploits. Craig holds master's degrees in information systems as well as international relations and finance from Brigham Young University and Webster University. He has held certifications as a computer forensic examiner by the FBI and by the International Association of Computer Investigative Specialists (IACIS). He was also certified as an FBI Cyber Agent and holds SANS/GIAC, CompTIA A+, Network+, and Security+ certifications.
